title: Shamshel in Godzilla
wikitext:
[]: Shamshel in Godzilla             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:44 pm I was watching Godizilla 2000 with my boyfriend, who knows nothing about anime. Near the end of the movie, the bad guy changes shape or something and looks like this. when they showed this form I immeditly yelled out "Shamshel!!!" my boyfriend asked me what i was talking about and I rambled on about Evangelion. He of course was confused. But c'mon dont they look so similar in design.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:49 pm They do look a little similar but I wouldn't say it's the angel.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:53 pm they do look similar but only from a certain sight of view, the godzilla one looks like a jellyfish,

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:58 pm coincidence 'sides, they're not that similar

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 24, 2009 3:36 pm Similar, but my opinion is that you're seeing what you want to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 24, 2009 3:43 pm well if you watch the movie, the thing changes a whole lot, and that was the closest picture I could find to the form I wanted, And I never said it was copied, I just thought they look similar. I knew it was a coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Aug 24, 2009 4:50 pm From that angle, they do look a bit similar, but the designs are completely different Shamshel is a giant, phallic bug and that thing's a weird jelly-fish squid thing.

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Mon Aug 24, 2009 5:00 pm As a Godzilla fan, Millennian on that angle looks like him, with the tentacles and all that he looks quite similar. But Millennian's head doesn't look phallic. No phallic, No Shamshel.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Aug 24, 2009 5:46 pm That Godzilla beast looks more like the Farpoint Station of Star Trek TNG than Shamshel. Plus, you know, nearly everything we humans design are based on the natural world. Even our Eldritch horrors like Cthulu can basically be described by saying "like an octopus, but..." Shamshel and Godzillabeing just draw from the same form of tentacled sources.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:34 pm See, I always thought the way the monster wrapped around Godzilla's head at the end of the movie was more similar to the Eva battle in episode 2.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Aug 26, 2009 10:07 pm Well do they look similar but nothing a like, I never notice that until now. That was Orga in his Spaceship that crash landed on Earth millions of years ago, where it was converted into anti-matter.
summary: []: Shamshel in Godzilla             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 24, 2009 2:44 pm I was watching Godizilla 2000 with my boyfriend, who knows nothing about anime. Near the end of the movie, the bad guy changes shape or something and looks like this. when they showed this form I immeditly yelled out "Shamshel!!!" my boyfriend asked me what i was talking about and I rambled on about Evangelion. He of course was confused.
